title: The Candy Cosmos Quest
premise: A pint-sized space explorer ventures across a universe made of sweets, seeking to uncover the legendary Sugar Star.

chapters.title: Gummy Grove Galaxy
chapters.setting: A vibrant planet where trees are lollipops, rivers flow with lemonade, and the ground is soft, spongy gummy. Bright, pastel colors dominate the landscape.
chapters.narration: You arrive at Gummy Grove, a planet bursting with sweet scents and bouncy terrain. Your mission is clear: find the Sugar Crystal Key to unlock the path forward.

mission.description: Find the glistening Sugar Crystal Key to unlock the next area!
mission.success_text: The Sugar Crystal Key hums, opening the way to new sugary adventures!
mission.fail_text: You couldn't find the key. The path remains locked.

chapters.title: Chocolate Crater Challenge
chapters.setting: A rugged planet with dark chocolate craters, molten caramel rivers, and treacherous nougat cliffs. Steam rises from hot fudge geysers, creating a thick, sweet mist.
chapters.narration: You land on the perilous Chocolate Crater, a world filled with delicious dangers. Collect rare Cocoa Beans to power your ship and escape the sticky traps.

mission.description: Collect all 5 rare Cocoa Beans to refuel your ship!
mission.success_text: With the Cocoa Beans collected, your ship hums with renewed energy!
mission.fail_text: You couldn't collect enough Cocoa Beans. Your ship sputters.

chapters.title: Licorice Labyrinth's Core
chapters.setting: The dark, twisting interior of a licorice planet, illuminated only by glowing rock candy formations and your ship's spotlight. Sharp, spiky licorice stalagmites and stalactites abound.
chapters.narration: Deep within the Licorice Labyrinth, a dark secret awaits. Navigate the treacherous tunnels and defeat the monstrous Hard Candy King to claim the fabled Sugar Star.

mission.description: Defeat the formidable Hard Candy King to claim the legendary Sugar Star!
mission.success_text: The Hard Candy King crumbles, revealing the shimmering Sugar Star!
mission.fail_text: The Hard Candy King stands victorious. The Sugar Star remains out of reach.

characters.hero: A tiny astronaut in a vibrant, oversized bubble helmet and a puffy, rainbow-striped suit, with small rocket boots.
characters.enemy_1: A wobbly, translucent, lime-green gummy blob with two large, googly eyes and a perpetually smiling mouth.
characters.enemy_2: A menacing, jagged red and blue hard candy shard creature with a single cyclops eye and two sharp, candy-cane arms.
characters.npc: A tall, wise lollipop with a swirling rainbow head, a gentle, smiling face, and a sturdy, wooden stick body.
characters.coin: A shiny, golden wrapped candy swirl.
characters.health: A sparkling, heart-shaped strawberry hard candy.
characters.key: A translucent, multi-faceted sugar crystal key that glows softly.
characters.platform: Bouncy, colorful gummy bear blocks and sturdy, striped wafer cookies.
characters.exit_door: A giant, spherical gumball machine with a clear dome, dispensing small, colorful gumballs.
